headline: Reassessing Builders FirstSource (BLDR) After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Builders FirstSource is starting to look attractively priced after a rough patch, this article walks through what the current share price might be implying about value. The stock closed at US$95.51, with returns of an 8.7% decline over 7 days, a 19.4% decline over 30 days, an 8.7% decline year to date, but gains of 14.0% over 3 years and 103.0% over 5 years, which may have some investors reassessing both upside and risk.
